mentions.note: AI-native insurance disruptor; 90% first-time buyers, fastest claims (1–2 sec), 10x growth since ChatGPT. Becoming EBITDA positive later 2026. Selloff driven by macro, not fundamentals — buy-in-dip opportunity.
AI-embedded InsurTech alternative to CCC; Cramer prefers this over cloud-based insurance software if seeking that exposure.
